name: corrosion
stylePhrase: dark toxic-wasteland 3D game asset render, high detail, dramatic acid-green rim lighting, consistent top-left lighting, ornate intricate corroded surface detail, deeply pitted and eaten-away material with glowing acid etching covering the entire body of the piece, not just the color palette

w.label: pale corroded-stone
w.palette: weathered pale gray-green stone and oxidized silver, chalky mineral crust, soft glowing pale-mint acid veins seeping through cracks

b.label: blackened corroded-iron
b.palette: near-black rusted iron with flaking oxide scale, vivid glowing toxic-green acid drips and molten veins pooling in the pits

pieces.k: a {SIDE} chess king, the small cross finial at the very top is half-dissolved and dripping, its edges eaten ragged by acid, the body below deeply pitted with glowing acid runnels streaming down from the collar
pieces.q: a {SIDE} chess queen, topped with soft rising wisps of glowing acid vapor instead of a crown, the body wrapped in melted, sagging drip folds like a candle corroded by acid rain
pieces.r: a {SIDE} chess rook tower, the flat notched rim is the very top, crumbling brickwork with whole bricks dissolved away leaving glowing acid-eaten cavities, acid pooling between the crenellations
pieces.b: a {SIDE} chess bishop, the smooth mitre head is scarred by a deep glowing acid channel running down its face like a burn, the body streaked with long corrosion drip trails
pieces.n: a {SIDE} chess knight horse head profile, the mane dissolved into dripping strands of glowing acid, the muzzle and neck pocked with corrosion pits and flaking scale
pieces.p: a small {SIDE} chess pawn, the shortest and humblest piece, the bare dome is the very top of the piece, its surface half-eaten by acid pitting with one bright glowing droplet running down the side
